_patch_meta.description: Dimension correction for group 879-002 (forgiveness registry 064). Current dimension: Emotion — Negative. Correct dimension: Theological/Divine-Human. Analytical basis: The group describes the absolute limit of forgiveness — the unforgivable sin (Mar 3:29), the blood requirement (Heb 9:22), and the finality of complete forgiveness (Heb 10:18). These are theological propositions about divine covenantal and moral conditions governing forgiveness access — not emotional states. No emotional content is described in the anchor verse (Mar 3:29) or the supporting verses. The correct dimension is Theological/Divine-Human, which names phenomena constitutively defined by the divine-human relationship — here, the divine determination of the conditions under which forgiveness is or is not extended.

operations.description: Correct dimension for group 879-002 from 'Emotion — Negative' to 'Theological/Divine-Human'; update dominant_subject from HUMAN to GOD (the divine determination of forgiveness limits is the subject matter)
